assertions.reason: In the live embedded surface, triggering review mode only exposed ribbon actions like '开始校审' and task panels; the expected initiator panel titled '发起编校审单' never rendered, so the open-panel assertion could not be exercised through the user surface.
Because the initiator panel never became available in the browser session, there was no visible component summary area to verify the selected-component text.
The package-name field and submit action were inaccessible in the live UI because the initiator form never opened, preventing required-field validation from being triggered.
The full initiator form fields (package name, description, checker, priority, due date) were not present in the browser surface, so complete-form entry could not be validated.
Without access to the initiator form, the attachment upload area never appeared, so upload progress and success list behavior could not be observed in the real UI.
No user path in the live browser session reached the create-task form, so POST /api/review/tasks success behavior, success toast, panel close, and task list refresh could not be validated.
evidence: GET http://localhost:3100/api/review/tasks observed in browser network log; no POST /api/review/tasks captured

assertions.reason: Because task creation could not be initiated from the live UI, the failure-handling path for POST /api/review/tasks was also unreachable.
evidence: No POST /api/review/tasks request captured in browser network log

frictions: The browser session runs without WebGL2, so the 3D viewer fails to initialize and object-selection-dependent initiator interactions are unavailable.
The '校审测试' entry opens an external embedded page but still lands on review/task surfaces rather than the initiator form.
The live review tab exposes '开始校审', '校审面板', '待审核', '复审任务', and '我的编校审', but not a visible '发起编校审单' workflow entry.
blockers: Primary blocker: the expected initiator panel never rendered in the real browser surface, so all VAL-INIT assertions remained unreachable.
Supporting blocker: the viewer shows '3D Viewer 初始化失败 / 需要 WebGL2', which likely prevents the selected-component state needed by the initiator flow.
Observed network in the embedded session was limited to GET /api/users/reviewers, GET /api/review/tasks, and POST /api/review/embed-url; no POST /api/review/tasks was triggered.
toolsUsed: agent-browser (open, screenshot --annotate, snapshot, get text, eval, network requests, console, errors, close)

summary.overall: Blocked: the live browser surface never exposed the initiator form required for VAL-INIT-001..007, and no create-task network call could be exercised.
